items.title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes killed 39
items.summary: Israel and Hezbollah have continued to trade fire despite a ceasefire deal being announced last month.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Delhi HC protects Congress MP Shashi Tharoor's personality rights; orders blocking of deepfakes
items.summary: The Delhi High Court granted interim relief to Congress MP Shashi Tharoor, ordering the removal of AI-generated deepfakes and synthetic media across digital platforms. The court...

items.title: One killed in Gaza as Turkish FM talks peace efforts with Hamas official
items.summary: Israel continues to violate a 'ceasefire' agreed to in October with hundreds more killed across the Strip.
